meaning: adj.脑筋转不过来的,旧思想的
examples: Yet France's Socialist Party also stands out as Europe's most unreconstructed.
Mr Prescott's punch reminded voters that he was irascible and unreconstructed.
Any thought of EU membership for an unreconstructed Ukraine must be years off.
In response, Mr Bush seems to have shifted tactically to calling him an unreconstructed liberal instead.
But its Tory critics are not restricted to the ranks of the unreconstructed right.
